title: rubus viburnifolius
intro: Rubus viburnifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
